message:
test(core): add 39 conformance oracle tests covering FK cascades, multi-way JOINs, CTEs, expressions, triggers, and type edges

New test file conformance_oracle_s55.rs with 39 tests (0 mismatches with C SQLite):
- FK ON DELETE CASCADE/SET NULL
- Multi-way LEFT JOIN with NULL propagation
- Nested CTE with aggregation
- UNION ALL ORDER/LIMIT combinations
- NULLIF/IIF expression edges
- ORDER BY CASE expressions
- INSERT defaults and OR REPLACE/IGNORE
- Correlated subqueries in SELECT list
- Complex UPDATE with subquery WHERE
- Trigger INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE logging
- COALESCE with subqueries
- GROUP_CONCAT separator variants
- typeof() in expression contexts
- Cross-type arithmetic
- Recursive CTE (counter, powers, factorial, string building)
- HAVING without GROUP BY
- LIKE complex patterns with ESCAPE
- CAST edge cases (NULL, prefix parsing, truncation)
- ZEROBLOB/LENGTH/HEX
- BETWEEN with NULL operands
- IN list with NULL elements
- Transaction savepoint complex (rollback + release)
- DEFAULT value expressions
- Multi-column ORDER BY
- DISTINCT with ORDER BY
- CREATE TABLE AS SELECT
- DELETE with subquery WHERE
- Rowid edge cases
- INSERT...SELECT with transforms
- Empty table aggregates
- Mixed-type sort ordering
- Compound SELECT with NULL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
